title: RenuviaMD DeMatos BHRT Protocol
supports_claim: Patient-facing BHRT roadmap structure: labs, hormone plan, supplements, nutrition/exercise, follow-up, action checklist.
does_not_support: Does not establish external evidence for all claims; needs guideline audit and safer language in places.

title: RenuviaMD Suleika Menopause Protocol
supports_claim: Clinical protocol structure: symptom map, MHT/nonhormonal options, supplement tiers, diet/exercise, visit cadence, lab monitoring.
does_not_support: Does not establish external evidence for every dose/supplement claim; needs source audit per row.

title: NAMS 2022 HT position statement
supports_claim: HT remains most effective for VMS/GSM and prevents bone loss/fracture; risks vary by route/type/duration/timing/progestogen.
does_not_support: Does not prove peptide synergy with MHT/BHRT.

title: Global consensus testosterone therapy for women
supports_claim: Only evidence-based indication for testosterone therapy in women is postmenopausal HSDD after biopsychosocial assessment.
does_not_support: Does not support testosterone for general energy/mood/cognition/weight loss in women.

title: Endocrine Society testosterone therapy in men
supports_claim: Men's testosterone therapy requires symptoms/signs plus consistently low testosterone and safety exclusions/monitoring.
does_not_support: Does not support testosterone for wellness goals alone.

title: AUA testosterone deficiency guideline
supports_claim: AUA supports TT <300 ng/dL as diagnostic support with symptoms/signs.
does_not_support: Does not support treating lab value alone.

title: ACP age-related low testosterone guideline
supports_claim: ACP recommends against testosterone for age-related low T when goal is energy/vitality/physical function/cognition.
does_not_support: Does not cover all organic hypogonadism cases.

title: FDA 2025 testosterone label update
supports_claim: Adds/updates BP warning and TRAVERSE CV context.

title: HHS 2026 testosterone labeling update request
supports_claim: Updates prostate/BPH context while preserving screening/monitoring recommendations.
does_not_support: Does not remove prostate/BPH review needs.

title: Peptide Stack Family Master v1
supports_claim: Nine non-overlapping peptide stack families and IV/IM support families.
does_not_support: Does not prove clinical outcomes or hormone synergy.
